case_title: SCOTT, EDWIN E. VS PETRONI, LORENZO DBA NORTH BEACH RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-28-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCOTT, EDWIN E. AS TO DEFENDANT PETRONI, LORENZO DBA NORTH BEACH RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PETRONI, LORENZO DBA NORTH BEACH RESTAURANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCOTT, EDWIN E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PETRONI, LORENZO DBA NORTH BEACH RESTAURANT CASE SETTLED. DEF WILL GIVE PLFT ONE FREE MEAL AT DEF'S RESTAURANT. DISM WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PETRONI, LORENZO DBA NORTH BEACH RESTAURANT CASE SETTLED. DEF WILL GIVE PLFT ONE FREE MEAL AT PLFT'S RESTAURANT. DISM WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
